title: Indulgent Mediterranean Sea Bass Fillets Grilled
description: Moist sea bass fillets smothered in a zesty herby glaze and grilled to perfection, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Sea Bass Fillets
ingredients.notes: Fresh or frozen fillets, skin removed (about 1 1/2 pounds total)

instructions: Rinse the sea bass fillets under cold water, pat them dry with paper towels, and season with salt and pepper.
In a small saucepan, combine 1/4 cup olive oil, 2 cloves minced garlic, and 2 tablespoons chopped fresh oregano. Heat over low heat, stirring occasionally, for 2-3 minutes.
Brush the sea bass fillets with the garlic-herb oil, making sure to coat them evenly.
Place the sea bass fillets on the grill, skin side down (if they have skin). Close the grill lid and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until the skin is crispy and golden brown.
Flip the sea bass fillets over and grill for an additional 3-4 minutes, or until they are cooked through and flake easily with a fork.
Transfer the sea bass fillets to a plate and let them rest for 2-3 minutes before serving.
Serve the sea bass fillets with additional garlic-herb oil spooned over the top, if desired.
